evaluations.query: Import this claude.ai/design handoff bundle and scaffold the components
expected_behavior: Delegates parsing to the orchestrator agent rather than reimplementing the tarball schema
Deduplicates proposed components against the existing codebase via component-search
Writes provenance metadata so future imports can detect drift between design versions

evaluations.query: The handoff bundle is missing an answer to one of its chat questions
expected_behavior: Surfaces the last unanswered question and what the user should do
Does not crash on the incomplete bundle

evaluations.query: Import a bundle whose prototypes reference remote images and stylesheets
expected_behavior: Keeps and asset references as URLs
Does not download the referenced assets during import

evaluations.query: Build me a new dashboard component from scratch
expected_behavior: Recognizes there is no claude.ai/design handoff bundle to import
Does not invoke the import pipeline and points to component generation instead
